tasks.task: Fix Prompt Generator to Preserve User Description
tasks.description: Rewrite SYSTEM_INSTRUCTION in GeminiAdapter so that the user's text_prompt is treated as a scene description to be expanded, not as an instruction to be interpreted.

steps.description: Rewrite SYSTEM_INSTRUCTION to explicitly instruct the LLM to incorporate the user's description into the positive_prompt
Add instruction that the user input describes WHAT to draw and must appear as the core subject in positive_prompt
Write unit tests verifying SYSTEM_INSTRUCTION contains key directives about preserving user description

tasks.acceptance-criteria: SYSTEM_INSTRUCTION explicitly states user input is a scene description not a command. SYSTEM_INSTRUCTION requires user's subject/description to be the core of positive_prompt. _construct_request passes user text_prompt in contents unchanged. All existing prompt gen tests pass.

unit: SYSTEM_INSTRUCTION contains directive to treat user input as scene description
SYSTEM_INSTRUCTION contains directive to preserve user's subject in positive_prompt
_construct_request includes user text_prompt in contents list unchanged
e2e-manual: Run 'python main.py --prompt "a fire dragon" --debug' and verify positive_prompt contains 'fire dragon'

tasks.task: Make Pre-processing Stage Opt-in Instead of Default
tasks.description: Change pre-processing to be skipped by default and add --pre-process CLI flag to enable it explicitly.

steps.description: Add --pre-process store_true CLI flag (default False) to build_parser()
In create_pipeline(), conditionally create PreProcessor only when pre_process flag is True
Thread the pre_process flag from args through to create_pipeline via a parameter or config field
Write unit tests verifying pre-processor is None by default and present when --pre-process is passed

tasks.acceptance-criteria: By default (no --pre-process flag), the pipeline runs without pre-processing (pre_processor is None). When --pre-process is passed, the PreProcessor is created and injected. All existing tests pass without modification.

unit: parse_args(['--prompt', 'x']) results in args.pre_process == False (default)
parse_args(['--prompt', 'x', '--pre-process']) results in args.pre_process == True
Orchestrator run() skips pre-processing when self._pre_processor is None (existing behavior verified)
integration: Full pipeline run without --pre-process skips pre-processing stage

tasks.task: Switch Downscaler from NEAREST to BOX Resampling
tasks.description: Replace Image.NEAREST with Image.BOX in the Downscaler class for area-average downsampling that preserves more detail.

steps.description: Change Image.NEAREST to Image.BOX in Downscaler.downscale() method
Update docstrings to reflect BOX resampling instead of NEAREST
Update existing unit tests that assert NEAREST behavior to expect BOX behavior

tasks.acceptance-criteria: Downscaler.downscale() uses Image.BOX for resampling. Docstrings reference BOX not NEAREST. All downscaler tests pass. Output images from post-processing pipeline use BOX resampling.

unit: Downscaler.downscale() on a 100x100 solid-color image returns correct solid color at 10x10
Downscaler.downscale() on a 4x4 checkerboard to 2x2 produces averaged colors (not sampled single pixels)
Downscaler.downscale() with target_size <= 0 still raises DownscaleError

tasks.description: Change palette_preset default from 'sweetie-16' to None so color quantization is skipped unless user explicitly requests it.

steps.description: Change palette_preset default from 'sweetie-16' to None in FullPipelineConfig
Change --palette CLI argument default from 'sweetie-16' to None in build_parser()
Update args_to_config() to only pass palette_preset when it is not None
Write unit tests verifying no quantization occurs when palette and colors are both None

tasks.acceptance-criteria: FullPipelineConfig.palette_preset defaults to None. CLI --palette defaults to None. When neither --palette nor --colors is provided, PostProcessingPipeline skips color quantization entirely. When --palette sweetie-16 is explicitly passed, quantization works as before. All existing tests pass.

unit: FullPipelineConfig() with user_prompt set has palette_preset=None by default
FullPipelineConfig(palette_preset='sweetie-16') sets palette_preset to 'sweetie-16'
parse_args(['--prompt', 'x']) results in args.palette == None (default)
parse_args(['--prompt', 'x', '--palette', 'gb']) results in args.palette == 'gb'
PostProcessingPipeline.process() with color_count=None and palette_preset=None skips quantization
integration: args_to_config with default args produces config.palette_preset=None resulting in no quantization

tasks.task: Change Default Target Sizes to 64 and 128
tasks.description: Update default target_sizes from [32, 64] to [64, 128] in FullPipelineConfig and CLI --sizes argument.

steps.description: Change target_sizes default from [32, 64] to [64, 128] in FullPipelineConfig
Change --sizes CLI default from '32,64' to '64,128' in build_parser()
Update unit tests that depend on default sizes to reflect new defaults

tasks.acceptance-criteria: FullPipelineConfig.target_sizes defaults to [64, 128]. CLI --sizes defaults to '64,128'. Users can still override with --sizes 32,64,128. All tests pass.

unit: FullPipelineConfig() with user_prompt set has target_sizes=[64, 128] by default
FullPipelineConfig(target_sizes=[32, 64]) overrides to [32, 64]
parse_args(['--prompt', 'x']) produces sizes == '64,128'
parse_args(['--prompt', 'x', '--sizes', '32,64,128']) produces sizes == '32,64,128'

tasks.task: Add --no-post-processing CLI Flag to Skip Post-processing
tasks.description: Add a --no-post-processing flag that stops the pipeline after PIXELIZATION, outputting the ComfyUI result directly.

steps.description: Add skip_post_processing: bool = False field to FullPipelineConfig
Add --no-post-processing store_true argument to build_parser()
Map args.no_post_processing to config.skip_post_processing in args_to_config()
In orchestrator run(), skip POST_PROCESSING stage when config.skip_post_processing is True and set final_asset_paths to pixelization output
Write unit tests for flag parsing, config mapping, and pipeline stage skipping

tasks.acceptance-criteria: When --no-post-processing is passed, pipeline stops after PIXELIZATION. final_asset_paths contains the pixelized image path. POST_PROCESSING does not appear in stage_results. Without flag, pipeline runs all stages as before. All existing tests pass.

unit: FullPipelineConfig() has skip_post_processing=False by default
FullPipelineConfig(skip_post_processing=True) sets the field
parse_args(['--prompt', 'x']) results in args.no_post_processing == False
parse_args(['--prompt', 'x', '--no-post-processing']) results in args.no_post_processing == True
run() with skip_post_processing=True and mocked stages skips POST_PROCESSING (not in stage_results)
run() with skip_post_processing=True sets final_asset_paths to pixelization output path
integration: Full pipeline with --no-post-processing from CLI produces config that skips post-processing
e2e-manual: Run 'python main.py --prompt "pixel art cat" --no-post-processing --debug' and verify only pixelized image is output
